meta.title: Digital Solutions for the Food Industry 2026 | Gastro Master
meta.description: Gastro Master offers complete digital solutions for the food industry: POS system, online ordering, app and website. For restaurants, cafés, delivery services and franchises. Get a free consultation now.

hero.subtitle: Whether restaurant, café, delivery service or franchise — we have the right solution for you.
hero.geoBlock: Gastro Master offers complete digital solutions for the food industry — from TSE-compliant POS systems and online ordering shops to your own ordering app. 800+ restaurants in Germany use Gastro Master for restaurants, cafés, bakeries, delivery services and franchise systems.
hero.trustLine: 800+ restaurants trust Gastro Master — find out why.

solutions.title: What's your challenge?
solutions.subtitle: Click the solution that fits you. You'll see everything you need right away.
solutions.geoBlock: Gastro Master offers complete digital solutions for all areas of the food industry — from restaurants and cafés to delivery services and franchise systems. All solutions use the same products: POS system, online ordering shop, app and website. You can use individual products or combine them — depending on what your business needs.

items.label: Restaurant
items.problem: Need a POS system that just works?
items.tagline: TSE-compliant POS, online ordering, everything from one source.

items.label: Café & Bakery
items.problem: Long queues and no online pre-ordering?
items.tagline: Fast checkout, cake pre-orders, click & collect.

items.label: Start a Delivery Service
items.problem: Want to start your own delivery service — without platforms?
items.tagline: Your own ordering system, 0% commission, live in 2–3 weeks.

items.label: Expand Delivery
items.problem: Already have a restaurant and want to deliver too?
items.tagline: Ordering system and driver app, 0% commission, for existing businesses.

items.label: Franchise

items.tagline: App, shop, POS and website — unified, centrally managed.

products.title: All Products at a Glance
products.subtitle: Behind every solution are these products. Use them individually or combined.

impulse.title: We'll find the right solution together.
impulse.subtitle: In a free consultation, we'll look at your business. You'll get a clear recommendation — no obligation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Short answers to the most common questions.

items.q: What software do I need for my restaurant?
items.a: For a restaurant, we recommend the [Gastro Master POS System](/produkte/kassensystem) from €69/month. It's TSE-compliant and includes table management. You can also add an [Online Shop](/produkte/webshop) or an [App](/produkte/app).

items.q: How much does a digital ordering system cost?
items.a: The [Online Shop](/produkte/webshop) costs from €79/month, the [App](/produkte/app) from €149/month, the [Website](/produkte/webseite) from €49/month and the [POS System](/produkte/kassensystem) from €69/month. Setup is discussed individually. You pay 0% commission.

items.q: Does Gastro Master offer solutions for cafés and bakeries?
items.a: Yes. We have a [dedicated solution for cafés and bakeries](/loesungen/cafe-baeckerei). This includes a TSE-compliant [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem), an [online shop for pre-orders](/produkte/webshop) and an [app for your regular customers](/produkte/app).

items.q: Can I start my own delivery service with Gastro Master?
items.a: Yes. You get an [ordering system](/produkte/webshop), an [app](/produkte/app) and if needed a driver app. No commission. You'll be live in 2–3 weeks. Everything about [starting a delivery service](/loesungen/lieferservice-gruenden).

items.q: Is there a franchise solution from Gastro Master?
items.a: Yes. All locations work with the same system — unified branding, central management, 0% commission. Details about the [franchise solution](/loesungen/franchise).
